Stockholm Public Library — Stadsbiblioteket

Opening Hours

Monday — Friday09:00 — 21:00
Saturday10:00 — 17:00
Sunday12:00 — 17:00

Closed on public holidays. Summer hours (June-August): closes 18:00 on weekdays.

Address: Sveavagen 73, 113 80 Stockholm

Phone: 08-508 310 60
